installConfigs.instructions: Replace <your-apify-api-token> with an Apify API token from https://console.apify.com/account/integrations. The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Exposes Apify actors, datasets, key-value stores, and run management to the assistant.

Replace <your-apify-api-token> with an Apify API token from https://console.apify.com/account/integrations. The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Exposes Apify actors, datasets, key-value stores, and run management to the assistant.
